assertions.assertion: No entryFlow can skip architecture confirmation because it is simple, local, bugfix, standalone, or missing architecture.md.
assertions.proof: Readiness and closeout gates now require active architectureConfirmationState and a pass architecture_confirmation_state_checked event.

assertions.assertion: Delivery Core Ready, P0, five-layer, or internal control markers cannot substitute for the architecture confirmation mental model.
assertions.proof: Gates read architectureConfirmationState plus state check only; they do not scan old reports, five-layer outputs, artifactIndex, or array order to choose a confirmation.

assertions.assertion: Missing recipe config, resolver bypass, private hash logic, or resolvedRecipeHash mismatch must block readiness and closeout.
assertions.proof: Architecture confirmation ingest, readiness gate, and closeout gate all call resolveArchitectureConfirmationHashRecipe().
